name: P31 home alignment registry
ephemeralization: One canonical source per concern; generate or verify downstream artefacts. No parallel lore. A change in a source is intentionally coupled to its sinks: CI and this file tell you which command heals or proves alignment.

sources.role: Operator-locked numbers, mission snippet, ground-truth version/schema pins, mesh URLs
p31.shipbox/1.0.0 — JSON handoff snapshot (package, git head, public constants, file flags); p31:shipbox, verify:shipbox
Human manifest for shipbox snapshot; pairs with verify:shipbox and P31-ROOT-MAP handoff row
Human manifest for p31.facts contract; pairs with verify:facts
Keystone: create/connect, ephemeralization, ethical monetization, scale, organize
BONDING phased when-scale plan; cadence and Phase 0–3 gates
Command center from iPhone: LAN bind, Home Screen icon, Tailscale
Command center on Chrome OS: Crostini, PWA, LAN
Safe-area / responsive layer for passport + static pages; mirrored to p31ca public via sync:passport
p31.facts/1.0.0 — machine-verified paths/keys; npm run verify:facts (mesh URLs, @p31/mesh, policy-file substring guard)
p31.envManifest/1.0.0 — catalog of P31_* env vars (names + semantics only); npm run verify:p31-env; npm run list:p31-env
p31.contractRegistry/1.0.0 — JSON contract index derived from alignment sources; npm run build:contract-registry; verify:contract-registry; hub /contract-builder.html
p31.chainAnchor/0.1.0 — EVM transparency anchor registry addresses + default manifest URLs; pairs with packages/p31-sovereign-chain; npm run verify:sovereign-chain
p31.sovereignLayers/0.1.0 — full decentralized stack index (L1–L12); npm run verify:sovereign-layers; human map docs/P31-SOVEREIGN-LAYERS.md
p31.launchReadinessConfig/0.1.0 — ten-lane market launch audit config; npm run verify:launch-readiness-config; runner npm run launch:audit / launch:gate / launch:rehearsal
p31.launchChecklist/0.1.0 — human-gate sign-off rows for launch; flip via npm run launch:check
p31.reportsIndex/0.1.0 — committed metadata for operator reports (full bodies live in ~/.p31/reports/); rebuild via npm run reports:index; verify:reports-index

p31.glassBox/0.1.0 — public live transparency terminal; mirrors to andromeda/04_SOFTWARE/p31ca/public/glass-box.html via npm run build:glass-box; gate verify:glass-box (no secrets, structure check). Live at https://p31ca.org/glass-box · short /glass · /transparency. Reads docs/verify-pulse.json (real heartbeat) + docs/reports/promoted/index.json (published reports).
Iframe-friendly compact widget rendering verify-pulse + latest public reports. Same verify gate as glass-box (no secrets). Embed via <iframe src="/glass-box-widget.html" width="540" height="360">.

p31.demosIndex/0.1.0 — gallery + share-kit for the four mind-bending visualizations. Mirrors to p31ca/public/demos/index.html via npm run build:demos; verify:demos. Live at https://p31ca.org/demos-public · short /visuals.
p31.k4MeshDemo/0.1.0 — Three.js K₄ tetrahedron family-mesh visualizer. CC-BY 4.0.
p31.alignmentGraphDemo/0.1.0 — force-directed render of p31-alignment.json (sources × derivations). Reads ./p31-alignment.json relative; build:demos copies the registry alongside.
p31.larmorPulseDemo/0.1.0 — visual circulation of the 863 Hz Larmor canon flowing into 40+ surfaces, pulsing at the constant itself (100× downsampled).
Share-kit (Bluesky / X / LinkedIn / Mastodon) for the four demos. Anti-FOMO voice; CC-BY 4.0; mirror via build:demos.

Curator's walk through the codebase highlighting the mind-bending primitives (K₄, ephemeralization, Larmor canon, sovereign layers, glass box, SMART suite, reports). Anchor doc for journalists, grants, future operators.

p31.verifyPulse/0.1.0 — committed heartbeat of last 20 successful root verify runs (ts, git head, durationMs, stepCount). Operator records via npm run pulse or npm run verify:pulse. verify:verify-pulse gates shape; mirrored to p31ca/public/verify-pulse.json.

p31.reportsPromoted/0.1.0 — generated index of published reports (markdowns the operator opted in via npm run reports:promote). Build via npm run build:reports-promoted; verify:reports-promoted gates shape + every entry's .md exists.
p31.subscriptions/1.0.0 — canonical AI subscription stack (Opus + Gemini + Composer 2) + API budget; verify:subscriptions
p31.productionReadiness/1.0.0 — PRS scoring for hub cards + Workers; verify:production-readiness + verify:launch-lane-sync; launchGovernance enforces governed Workers + pages floor
p31.launchLane/0.1.0 derived index for governed Workers + p31ca; npm run generate:launch-lane after PRS or fleet URL edits
CWP-P31-PROD-EQUILIBRIUM-WRAPUP-2026-04-28 — final wrap-up: PRS system + proof ladder + parallel convergence operating rules
Human manifest for p31.subscriptions contract; pairs with verify:subscriptions
Final handoff: mission system manifest, prep, assemble, definition of done; links P31-CREATE-CONNECT, fleet-portal, verify bar

Market launch + GTM spine — positioning, phased checklist, readiness lanes; indexes MVP inventory, PUBLIC-VOICE, ecosystem, ENTERPRISE-LAUNCH-PREP; §17 automation envelope (launch:auto, post-deploy:verify, p31-live-drift)
Atomic pre-deploy auto-pilot — release:public + strict ecosystem-glass + launch readiness rehearsal in one command (npm run launch:auto)
Post-deploy verify — wait for propagation then launch-smoke-net + strict ecosystem-glass + freshness probes; auto-runs in p31-autodeploy-hub.yml
Daily scheduled read-only drift workflow — verify:ecosystem + launch-smoke-net + ecosystem-glass strict; uploads /tmp/p31_glass_report.json on red. Disable: P31_DISABLE_LIVE_DRIFT repo Variable

Verifier for the deployed p31-social-worker (andromeda/04_SOFTWARE/cloudflare-worker/social-drop-automation/worker.js) — voice guardrails, per-platform char limits (Twitter 280 etc.), numerical drift vs p31-constants.json bonding.testBaseline, allowlist parity. P31_SOCIAL_STRICT=1 escalates warns. Skip lanes via P31_SOCIAL_SKIP_*. Chained in root verify after verify:discord-bot.

Read-only operator CLI — npm run social:health / status / waves / preflight; tries social.p31ca.org then workers.dev fallback. P31_SOCIAL_HOST override, P31_SOCIAL_FORCE_WORKERS_DEV=1 skip. Never triggers waves or broadcast.

Render every WAVE_CONTENT entry from the social worker + 7-day schedule preview without touching any platform. Per-platform char checks (Twitter 280, Bluesky 300, Mastodon 500, LinkedIn 3000, Discord 4000, Ko-fi 1500), voice guardrail scan, manifest schema p31.socialEngineSimulation/1.0.0. Writes ~/.p31/simulations/social-<utc>/{manifest.json,preview.md}. P31_SIM_OUT shared output. npm run sim:social.

Read-only preview of npm run launch:auto — prints chain of 7 steps with current preflight signals (git dirty/branch, last readiness/glass freshness, andromeda presence). Schema p31.launchAutoSimulation/1.0.0. Exits 1 if blockers, 0 otherwise (operational signal, not test failure). npm run sim:launch.

Omnibus simulator — chains social-engine + launch-auto + doc-library hub + delta-language hub + reports steady-week into ~/.p31/simulations/all-<utc>/manifest.json (schema p31.simulationsAll/1.0.0). --skip-reports / --skip-doc / --skip-delta / --json flags. Failures = lane exit non-zero. npm run sim:all.

Idempotent omnibus sync — apply:constants, build:contract-registry, sync:chain-anchor, build:fleet-portal, sync:live-fleet, build:doc-index, sync:doc-library, sync:delta-language, sync:atmosphere(+hub-routes), sync:passport, sync:discord-bot-swarm, sync:p31-starfield. Respects per-lane skip flags + --no-build. Writes manifest schema p31.syncAll/1.0.0 + git-dirty delta. P31_SYNC_ALL_DRY=1 echo-only. npm run sync:all.

Static gate for the simulation/sync omnibus surface — required scripts present, npm wirings exist (sim:social/launch/all, sync:all, verify:simulations, test:simulations), simulate-social-engine produces zero char-limit failures, simulate-launch-auto returns valid p31.launchAutoSimulation manifest. Chained in root verify after verify:social-engine. npm run verify:simulations.
Normative Gray Rock → Alive layouts and component patterns; pairs with canon-to-style-css + emitDesignDoctrineBlock

Read-only market-readiness scanner: walks public HTML/Astro/MD for avoid-list voice, AI clichés, leaked private strings (operator full names, known credential shapes), stale review markers, and rough-edge URLs; emits Tier A/B/C structured report; --strict exits non-zero on any Tier-A finding. derivations.apply: Edit p31-subscriptions.json when changing the canonical AI subscription stack; keep totals and cancellation targets explicit.
derivations.verify: npm run verify:subscriptions
derivations.note: Alignment guard: encodes the most economical + powerful trio (Opus + Gemini + Composer 2) and the agent API budget; not a billing scraper.

derivations.apply: edit p31-facts.json when adding externally cited file/path/key claims
derivations.verify: npm run verify:facts
derivations.note: Declarative invariants: required paths, mesh + org keys, https worker URLs, no credential-like substrings in policy files

derivations.apply: Edit docs/MESH-ARCHITECTURE-CANON.md when shipped vs next vs doctrine boundaries change; bump Shipped text when k4-mesh-core MESH_PAYLOAD_VERSION or vertex sets change.
derivations.verify: npm run verify:mesh-canon
derivations.note: Doc anchors + code invariants (partial clone: doc-only when andromeda/ missing)

derivations.apply: edit p31-env-manifest.json when adding or renaming documented P31_* variables
derivations.verify: npm run verify:p31-env
derivations.note: Deploy spine + env lore: docs/P31-DEPLOY-CANON.md; never store secret values in the manifest

derivations.apply: Edit normative Markdown + JSON together; run npm run sync:delta-language when p31ca checkout exists; glossary HTML uses meta p31-delta-json-href
derivations.verify: npm run verify:delta-language
derivations.note: Speakable layer over Universal UI vision — anchors, term groups, forbidden phrases; hub mirror optional for partial clone

derivations.apply: Tier A: operator-owned final draft + pair check; Tier B/C: copy ship checklist + npm run verify:public-voice
derivations.verify: npm run verify:public-voice
derivations.note: Grep guardrails + required doc anchors do not judge Tier A narrative quality; pair check remains mandatory for face/fundraising

derivations.apply: Run npm run probe:public-sanitization for the human-readable Tier A/B/C report; npm run verify:public-sanitization (--strict) exits non-zero on any Tier-A finding and is part of root verify
derivations.verify: npm run verify:public-sanitization
derivations.note: Complements verify:public-voice (which gates the 10 watched files). Sweeps a wider 127-file surface for credential leaks, operator-name leaks, AI clichés, and stale review markers. Tier-A leaks are release blockers.

derivations.apply: Garden Log optional checkbox merges Courier snapshot into garden_state; Phos system prompt names play_session as non-evaluative context only.
derivations.verify: npm run verify:phos-play-session-bridge
derivations.note: Verifier skips when p31ca path missing (partial clone).

derivations.apply: Edit docs JSON; run npm run sync:atmosphere (also runs at start of verify:atmosphere-ramp). starfieldAOD off requires starfieldPreset null; on/degraded require a canon preset key.
derivations.verify: npm run verify:atmosphere-ramp
derivations.note: Canon cross-check skipped when andromeda/ missing (partial clone); mirrors byte-identical to design-assets when p31ca present

to: p31-launch-lane.json — derived via npm run generate:launch-lane
derivations.apply: Update p31-production-readiness.json when shipping or hardening a product. Every hub card id and every liveFleet.workersVerified id must have a row; scores must stay 0–10 per dimension. Governance: all worker rows + governed pages ids (launchGovernance) must meet minGovernedScore and per-dimension floor. Re-run scripts/apply-prs-launch-governance.mjs when changing thresholds; npm run generate:launch-lane after PRS or fleet churn for machine-readable lane index.
derivations.verify: npm run verify:production-readiness && npm run verify:launch-lane-sync
derivations.note: Catalog hub cards stay outside governed gate until promoted individually.

derivations.apply: Follow simplex-v7/DEPLOY.md — or **`npm run simplex:bootstrap:apply`** when `wrangler.toml` has REPLACE_* placeholders; **`wrangler secret put …`; deploy per **§5**. Manually:** wrangler resources, paste IDs (if not using `--update-config`), secrets, d1 execute schema, deploy, attach route; wrangler secret put HA_* when SENTINEL calls HA.
derivations.verify: npm run verify:simplex && npm run verify:simplex-bootstrap
derivations.note: Included in root npm run verify after verify:doc-index.

derivations.apply: Email Routing route → this Worker in zone dashboard; wrangler deploy from simplex-email/; wrangler secret put MAIL_FORWARD_DESTINATION (verified inbox)
derivations.verify: npm run verify:simplex-email
derivations.note: Root `npm run verify` after `verify:simplex` + `verify:simplex-bootstrap`.

verifyPipeline.description: Root `package.json` `verify` = prelude + build:contract-registry + verify:contract-registry + scripts in order (incl. verify:live-fleet:p31ca-mirror after verify:ecosystem — home p31-live-fleet.json must match hub public mirror + fleet-entities + agent stubs when andromeda is a git work tree; verify:runbooks for docs/runbooks/README.md links; verify:delta-language for DELTA lexicon JSON + hub mirror; verify:public-voice for docs/PUBLIC-VOICE.md anchors + Tier B/C grep guardrails from docs/p31-public-voice-guardrails.json; verify:phos-play-session-bridge for quantum-family Phos handoff anchors (skips if p31ca missing); verify:atmosphere-ramp for docs/p31-atmosphere-ramp.json + docs/p31-atmosphere-routes.json vs universal canon; verify:quantum-deck for @p31/quantum-deck deck+shuffle tests + save schema envelope; verify:k4-agent-hub for the K₄ agent worker tetrahedron canon (manifest + wrangler + topology.js + crypto + dispatcher + smoke + agents.html + p31ca mirror parity, K₄ invariant |E|=n(n-1)/2, family triadic cover, federation block); verify:agents-mirror checks the agents.html mirror is up-to-date (skips when p31ca/public absent); verify:discord-bot for andromeda/04_SOFTWARE/discord/p31-bot when present — vitest + QA inspect/simulate/sync-check + generated manifest + root p31-discord-bot-swarm.json synced from manifest; verify:ecosystem cross-checks swarm vs manifest when bot tree present). verify:p31ca-contracts chains build:fleet-entities → verify:fleet-entities → verify:ground-truth → verify:worker-spa-launch → education → … verify:starfield syncs design-assets/starfield → p31ca public/lib; verify:fleet-ten checks scripts/p31-fleet-ten bundle; verify:fleet-llm-bridge aligns models.json ↔ continue-p31 ↔ .cursor/rules; verify:ollama-mcp + verify:ollama-tunnel-config gate Cursor Ollama bridges; verify:github-org validates docs/github-org-bundle/repos-metadata.json. Tier A face copy remains human pair check — verify:public-voice does not replace that. Update this file whenever `verify` changes.
verifyPipeline.preludeNote: Fast guard (verify-alignment.mjs): JSON + required sources. Skipped in the `--verify` loop (prelude already satisfied).
